sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Otis Worldwide Corp. stock (US68902V1070): Why Google Discover changes matter more now for elevator investors
feed.summary: Google's 2026 Discover Core Update is revolutionizing how investors receive information on companies like Otis Worldwide Corp. (NYSE:OTIS). This update provides personalized insights directly to mobile feeds, leveraging past activity to deliver tailored stories on Otis's performance, service revenue trends, and new equipment orders. This shift allows investors faster access to critical urban mobility trends and financial data, enabling more informed decision-making without extensive searching.

feed.title: The Amex Platinum Has $3,500 in Annual Value. Here's How to Use Every Dollar.
feed.summary: The American Express Platinum Card, despite its $895 annual fee, offers over $3,500 in annual value through various credits and benefits. This article details how cardholders can maximize each credit, including airline fee credits, hotel credits, Uber Cash, Resy dining credits, digital entertainment, lululemon credits, CLEAR+ membership, Oura Ring credit, and Walmart+ membership, along with extensive airport lounge access. It emphasizes that while the fee is steep, strategic use of these benefits can make the card highly valuable, particularly for frequent travelers and those who align with the card's lifestyle offerings.

feed.title: Invesco NASDAQ 100 ETF Rises on Mega-Cap Tech Strength
feed.summary: The Invesco NASDAQ 100 ETF (QQQM) has seen a 2.66% rise over the past week, with a net inflow of $707.33 million, driven by strong market sentiment towards its major mega-cap tech holdings. Nvidia's market value crossed $5 trillion, Apple received bullish analyst commentary with projected revenue growth from new products, and Microsoft gained support after a pullback, with analysts highlighting its AI and cloud demand. These factors collectively contribute to the ETF's positive performance.
